subject: [HOLMES] Fixed the Start-up Failure in the Dualstack Env
commit_message:
[HOLMES] Fixed the Start-up Failure in the Dualstack Env

Fixed the start-up failure in the dualstack and hence, updated the
docker image version.

Change-Id: Id0e98596016fe1fb772814b213792a1f6f5de439
Issue-ID: HOLMES-429
Signed-off-by: GuangrongFu <fu.guangrong@zte.com.cn>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange 3: Chained-CI build started (pipeline id: 282486000), max time: 14400 seconds

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

We need this change to fix Holmes to be operational on dualstack.
Holmes part already merged.
